TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241551. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 3 side b of tape: A mixture of songs (with brief introductions) to tribal tunes. The song titles are: 1) Send-Off to the Army; 2) I Miss You; 3) A Farmer's Happiness; 4) Breaking Up; 5) The Joy of Youth; 6) Farewell. Recorded in Oct 1964.
